rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §33.204 governs unsafe athletic techniques and has no relation to property tax exemptions.
quote: A coach, trainer, or sponsor for an extracurricular athletic activity may not encourage or permit a student participating in the activity to engage in any unreasonably dangerous athletic technique that unnecessarily endangers the health of a student
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and athletic safety statute.
